# MENZERNA CUT FORCE PRO ONE STEP POLISHING COMPOUND 1L

[Be the first to review this product](https://www.carcare24.eu/en/menzerna-cut-force-pro-one-step-polishing-compound-1l.html#review-form)

## CarCare24.eu - 2203.261, Menzerna Cut Force Pro one-step polishing compound eliminates sanding marks, scratches and leaves an ultra-high gloss finish.

In stock
**SKU** 2203.261

€59.95 €49.55

[**Details**](#description)
**Why buy this product?
**Strong and aggressive cutting one-step compound removes severe paint defects.
Leaves an ultra-high gloss finish.
Silicone free and minimal dust production.
Available in 250ml and 1L.
**
About this product:
**Menzerna Cut Force Pro is the new golden standard in paint repair, Menzerna Cut Force Pro is an effective one-step polishing compound that powerfully eliminates sanding marks, swirls, deep scratches and leaves an ultra-high gloss finish at top speed. This new water based polishing compound from Menzerna saves time and will make your polishing jobs much easier. Use with wool, grey or green D Con Delta Pro polishing Pads.
**
![image](https://www.carcare24.eu/media/wysiwyg/carcare24.eu-menzerna-cut-force-pro-banner.jpg)
